name: Pasta Primavera No. 1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, boil milk and basil with salt and pepper.
2. In a separate cup, mix cornstarch and water.
3. Add the cornstarch mixture to the boiling milk, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in Parmesan and cover; cook until hot.
5. Cook pasta according to package directions.
6. In a skillet, saute garlic, zucchini, broccoli, mushrooms, onions, and ham in oil until tender.
7. Add peas, pimentos, and pasta to the skillet; heat through.
8. Pour sauce over pasta and toss; serve immediately.
